events.name: A New Journey
events.description: The world stretches before you.

lines: The world stretches before you, vast and unexplored.
Your legs carry you forward. The journey begins.

outcomes.text: Journey begun! Walk to explore.

events.name: Roadside Find
events.description: Something glints in the grass.

kind.description: A small pouch of coins half-buried in the dirt.

outcomes.text: Found 50 gold!

events.name: Forest Town
events.description: A bustling town nestled among the trees.

kind.speaker: Town Elder
lines: Welcome, traveler. I have waited long for someone like you.
This is the Starstone. It was entrusted to our village generations ago.
It must be taken to the Frozen Spire in the far east. Only there can its power be unleashed.
Take this potion for the road. Seek the Shrine of Light to the northwest - it will guide you.

outcomes.text: Received the Starstone and a Health Potion!

events.name: Forest Town Shop
events.description: A small shop in the forest town.

events.name: Shrine of Light
events.description: An ancient shrine radiating warmth.

kind.speaker: Shrine Voice
lines: The Starstone... it pulses in your hands.
Long ago, this stone was forged in the heart of the Frozen Spire.
To return it, you must cross mountains and swamps. Seek allies and tools.
The Ranger in the forest to the south knows the safe paths. Find her.

outcomes.text: The shrine reveals the Ranger's location!

events.name: Ranger's Lodge
events.description: A well-kept cabin deep in the forest.

kind.speaker: Ranger Elara
lines: A Starstone bearer! I knew this day would come.
The direct path east is blocked by mountains and swamp.
Head north to the Crossroads Village. The merchant there sells what you need.
Take this map - it shows shortcuts through the dense forest.

outcomes.text: Received Forest Map! Crossroads revealed.

events.name: Abandoned Farmstead
events.description: A crumbling farmhouse, long abandoned.

kind.description: You find a stash of coins hidden under the floorboards.

outcomes.text: Found 80 gold in the abandoned farmstead!

events.name: Meadow Hamlet
events.description: A peaceful village surrounded by fields.

kind.speaker: Farmer Brynn
lines: Careful on the roads, stranger. Bandits have been raiding from the east.
If you're heading north, stop at the Crossroads - the merchant has rare goods.
And beware the witch in the swamp west of here. She's... unpredictable.

outcomes.text: Visited Meadow Hamlet! +25 gold

events.name: Crossroads Village
events.description: A village at a major crossroads.

events.name: Shrine of Winds
events.description: A windswept shrine on a hilltop.

kind.speaker: Wind Spirit
lines: The winds carry whispers of ancient ruins to the east.
Great treasures lie there, but so do great dangers.
May the winds speed your journey, Starstone bearer.

outcomes.text: The wind reveals the ruins to the east!

events.name: Goblin Cave
events.description: A foul-smelling cave with crude markings.

kind.description: Three goblins leap from the shadows!

outcomes.text: Defeated the goblins! Found 60 gold in their hoard.

events.name: Woodland Settlement
events.description: A small settlement deep in the forest.

kind.speaker: Woodcutter Harn
lines: The ruins to the east? Aye, I've seen them.
Strange lights at night. Soldiers who never came back.
If you must go, be prepared. The fortress is overrun with bandits.

outcomes.text: Visited Woodland Settlement! +20 gold

events.name: Witch's Cottage
events.description: A crooked cottage surrounded by strange mushrooms.

kind.speaker: Witch Morgath
lines: Hehehehe... your charm protects you well from my swamp.
I sense the Starstone on you. Powerful. Dangerous.
Take this potion. You'll need it where you're going.
The Dark Descent beneath the mountain... bring rope.

outcomes.text: The Witch gives you a Mystery Potion and reveals the dungeon!

events.name: Hidden Grotto
events.description: A beautiful hidden cave with crystal formations.

kind.description: Gems sparkle in the crystal walls. You carefully extract some.

outcomes.text: Found 150 gold worth of crystals!

events.name: Swamp Crossing
events.description: A village built on stilts above the murky water.

kind.speaker: Swamp Elder Moss
lines: Few outsiders brave the swamp. Your charm serves you well.
The ancient crypt to the far east holds a key you'll need.
But first, the Highland Outpost guards will want proof of your strength.
Defeat the bandits at the Crumbling Fortress. Then they'll trust you.

outcomes.text: Highland Outpost revealed! Defeat the bandits first.

events.name: Overgrown Ruins
events.description: Ancient stone walls peek through dense vegetation.

kind.speaker: Weathered Inscription
lines: These ruins predate the kingdoms of men.
Here, the Starstone was first discovered by the ancient mages.
They carried it north, to the peak they called the Frozen Spire.
There it was sealed away... until it was stolen and brought south.

outcomes.text: Learned the Starstone's ancient history! +50 gold

events.name: Crumbling Fortress
events.description: A half-destroyed fortress overrun by bandits.

kind.description: A scarred bandit captain draws his blade!

outcomes.text: Defeated the Bandit Captain! +120 gold. The Highland guards will hear of your valor.

events.name: Highland Outpost
events.description: A fortified village on the grassland edge.

kind.speaker: Guard Captain Voss
lines: Word of your victory at the fortress reached us. Well done.
The mountains ahead are deadly cold. Take this cloak.
Beyond the mountains lies the Frozen Spire. But you'll need the Tower Key.
The Forgotten Crypt to the east may hold it. Bring rope.

outcomes.text: Received Warm Cloak! Crypt and Tower locations revealed.

events.name: Bandit Camp
events.description: A rough camp with smoldering fires.

kind.description: Bandits emerge from their tents, weapons drawn!

outcomes.text: Cleared the bandit camp! +90 gold

events.name: Mountain Refuge
events.description: A hardy village clinging to the mountainside.

kind.speaker: Mountain Guide Kael
lines: You made it through the cold! Not many do.
The Dark Descent is below us. Ancient and terrible.
You'll need rope to descend safely. Inside you'll find the Frost Key.
That key opens the inner chambers of the Frozen Spire.

outcomes.text: Mountain Refuge! The Dark Descent location is clear.

events.name: The Dark Descent
events.description: A yawning chasm descends into darkness.

kind.description: A massive wyrm coils in the depths, guarding something that glows!

outcomes.text: Defeated the Cavern Wyrm! Found the Frost Key!

events.name: Hermit's Hut
events.description: A tiny hut at the edge of the world.

kind.speaker: Old Hermit
lines: I have lived in the shadow of the Spire for decades.
Once, it was a place of great magic. Now only ice and darkness.
The Tower Key lies in the Forgotten Crypt to the south.
And the Frost Key from the Dark Descent opens the inner sanctum.
You will need both to reach the Starstone's resting place.

outcomes.text: The Hermit reveals the Frozen Spire's location!

events.name: Mountain Lookout
events.description: A high vantage point above the clouds.

kind.description: From this height, you can see the entire eastern landscape.

outcomes.text: The view reveals vast areas of the map!

events.name: Grassland Capital
events.description: A grand town on the open plains.

events.name: The Forgotten Crypt
events.description: An ancient crypt sealed for centuries.

kind.description: A skeletal warrior rises from its sarcophagus, ancient blade in hand!

outcomes.text: Defeated the Crypt Guardian! Found the Tower Key!

events.name: The Frozen Spire
events.description: An immense tower of ice and ancient stone.

kind.description: The Frost Lord awakens! Ice cracks and reforms as a towering figure of pure cold rises before you!

outcomes.text: The Frost Lord falls! The Starstone glows with blinding light!

events.name: The Starstone Returns
events.description: The quest is complete.

lines: The Starstone rises from your hands, drawn to the heart of the Spire.
Ancient magic surges through the tower. The ice begins to melt.
Light pours from the peak, visible across the entire land.
You have restored the Starstone. The world is forever changed.
THE END - Thank you for playing!

outcomes.text: QUEST COMPLETE! The Starstone has been returned!

events.name: Wolf Pack
events.description: Yellow eyes gleam between the trees.

kind.description: A pack of hungry wolves emerges from the undergrowth!

outcomes.text: Wolves defeated! +30 gold

events.name: Road Goblin
events.description: A goblin blocks the path!

kind.description: A scrappy goblin jumps out from behind a rock!

outcomes.text: Goblin defeated! +40 gold

events.name: Cave Bear
events.description: A dark cave with scratch marks on the walls.

kind.description: A massive bear guards its territory!

outcomes.text: Defeated the Cave Bear! +60 gold
